summary: Sales Orders feature testing completed successfully. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend Sales Orders page at /staff/orders is fully functional with table, filters, search, and drawer components working correctly.

issues: staff-sidebar-links.js config exists with My Orders link but no visible sidebar component renders these links in the staff workspace. Users must navigate directly to /staff/orders or access via admin sidebar 'Staff Workspace' then manually navigate.

critical_code_review_comments: staff-sidebar-links.js is defined but only used in NavigationAuditPage, not in actual staff layout. Consider adding a sidebar component to staff pages that uses this config.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Orders feature fully working. GET /api/sales/orders returns paginated orders with customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone. GET /api/sales/orders/{order_id} returns detailed order with customer, sales (empty if not assigned), items. Status and search filters work. Frontend SalesOrdersPageV2 at /staff/orders has table with Order, Customer, Date, Amount, Status, Vendor columns. Status filter buttons and search input work. SalesOrderDrawerV2 opens on row click showing Customer, Assigned Sales (shows 'Not yet assigned' when no sales), Line Items, Financial Summary, Timeline sections. Close button works. No orders currently have assigned_sales_id so sales enrichment returns empty object - this is expected.

GET_sales_orders_pagination.details: Returns orders array with total, page, pages fields

GET_sales_orders_customer_fields.details: Each order has customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone

GET_sales_orders_search_filter.details: ?search=KON returns orders matching KON in order_number

GET_sales_orders_detail.details: Returns detailed order with customer, sales, items

GET_admin_orders_sales_enrichment.details: Admin orders endpoint includes sales enrichment (empty when no assigned_sales_id)

frontend_sales_orders_page.details: Page renders at /staff/orders with table showing Order, Customer, Date, Amount, Status, Vendor columns

frontend_status_filters.details: All, Processing, In Progress, Ready, Completed, Delivered filter buttons work

frontend_search_input.details: Search input filters orders by order number

frontend_order_drawer.details: Clicking order row opens SalesOrderDrawerV2 with Customer, Assigned Sales, Line Items, Financial Summary, Timeline sections
